seo.metaDescription: Eat First show: lobby, player and host desk, OBS browser overlay. Twitch channel {nick}.

landing.documentTitle: StreamAssist — video calls, games, and stream overlays
landing.heroSubtitle: Video calls, chat games, and an OBS overlay — without rebuilding your whole stack.
landing.featureCallsBody: Low-friction rooms for co-streams, guests, and quick sync — tuned for stream workflows.
landing.featureGamesBody: Wordle-style play with chat energy — keep viewers engaged between segments.
landing.featureOverlayBody: A browser source-friendly layer for shows that need on-screen game state and branding.
landing.closingLead: Jump into the app, or open a single mode from the buttons below.

garticShow.title: Nadraw
garticShow.cameraPlaceholder: Camera / capture goes here (OBS or browser).
garticShow.settingsCompactHint: These options apply to the next round when you press Start.
garticShow.breakViewerWait: Waiting for the streamer to continue…
garticShow.idleSetupSubtitle: Pick duration, round count, and word source — then start.
garticShow.chatMaskedHint: Guess the word in Twitch chat
garticShow.stateIdle: Idle — start a round when you are ready.
garticShow.stateActive: 🟢 Guessing unlocked — first exact match wins.
garticShow.stateRevealed: Round revealed — clear or start again.
garticShow.feedbackRateLimit: Slow down — one guess every 2 seconds.
garticShow.feedbackGuessLocked: 🔒 Too early — guessing is still locked.
garticShow.feedbackWrong: Already solved — that guess no longer counts.

wordleLeaderboard.title: Leaderboard
wordleLeaderboard.lead: Global wins, longest win streak, and rating (+1 per win, −1 per loss) from saved rounds.

callPage.title: Video call
callPage.hintPrejoin: One tap joins the room, sets up transports, camera and mic.
callPage.roomJoinHeaderHint: Confirm the room code with the button in the header (“Join room”).
callPage.qualityAdminHint: Server-assigned admins only. Others use automatic quality.

quality.auto: Auto — adapts to room size (next join)

wordleUi.statsAria: Wins and losses on this device
wordleUi.kbdToolbarAria: Submit guess, word length, and backspace
wordleUi.streamToolsAria: Reveal the word on stream or pick a new one
wordleUi.chatRelayAria: Twitch channel messages relayed through StreamAssist
wordleUi.chatEmpty: 👋 Welcome! Chat from #{channel} will appear below.
wordleUi.chatGuessLenHint: 💬 Twitch: one message — one word, exactly {n} letters.
wordleUi.chatIrcDisconnected: Twitch chat relay disconnected — messages may pause until it recovers.
wordleUi.chatIrcError: Twitch chat relay error — check server logs.
wordleUi.cooldownHint: Too fast — wait ~{seconds}s between guess messages

app.twitchAria: {nick} on Twitch (opens in a new tab)
app.navEatDisabledTitle: Eat First — disabled in navigation for now
app.navEatDisabledAria: Eat First — not available in the menu
app.footerLineEat: {year} {nick}. All rights reserved. “Who do we eat first” — original show UI.
app.authModalLead: Enter email and password — we create an account if needed, or log you in. Or use Twitch / Google.
app.authOr: or
app.authEmailErrorValidation: Check your email format and use a password of at least 6 characters.
app.authEmailServerError: Something went wrong. Try again later.
app.authTwitchHint: Recommended for streamers — full Twitch session and stream features.
app.authSignupEmailTaken: This email is already registered. Switch to Log in.
app.authForgotLead: Enter the email for your account.
app.authForgotSuccessBody: Password reset email is not enabled on this server yet. Use Twitch or Google to sign in, or contact support.
app.authNeedLogin: Sign in to open that page.
app.authNeedLoginHeaderHint: Use Sign up in the top-right.
app.authHomeHint: Use Twitch or Google — same session as nadle (Twitch) when you log in there.

onboarding.dontShowAgain: Do not show again for this page

steps.title: Game id
steps.text: Enter the room id from the show and press OK — slots and room data load below.

steps.title: Who you are
steps.text: Players pick a slot further down; the host uses a separate desk link. OBS: global grid — “OBS · overlay” button; personal URL — on your slot.

steps.title: Slots
steps.text: “My panel” or claim a slot, then “Overlay” copies the browser-source URL for OBS.

steps.title: OBS hints
steps.text: Quick checklist: transparent background, scene size, refresh when active — details in this block.

steps.title: Mode & sections
steps.text: Top strip: desk mode, collapse all sections, or clear the saved key. Open the sections you need as you go.

steps.title: Live & phases
steps.text: Live room: show phase, links for players, timers. In voting, run the poll per your rules; players vote from their panels.

steps.title: Slot roster
steps.text: Pick a slot — tools on the right: card, elimination, noms, bulk ops. Changes appear on overlays immediately.

steps.title: Generation
steps.text: Scenario, random traits, and global rolls for the whole cast — the “tabletop” tools live here.

steps.title: Hand & ready
steps.text: Quick controls: raised hand for the host and your ready state. Availability depends on phase and room rules.

steps.title: Profile & traits
steps.text: Show or hide lines for viewers on your overlay with the toggles next to fields. The host drives phases.

steps.title: Active card
steps.text: Scenario card: request from the host or wait for a deal. Reopen this tour anytime via “How to use” in the header.

steps.title: Audience scene
steps.text: Do not click this while playing — add it as a browser source on top of video. Everything below is what viewers see.

steps.title: Frame the card
steps.text: Scale and crop the source to your webcam; enable transparent background in OBS. Same URL as “Overlay” in the lobby.

join.lead: Room lobby: viewers see each streamer’s personal camera via their overlay — the global grid is only a helper.
join.step1: Enter game id and pick your slot below
join.step2: Open your overlay in OBS (the “Overlay” button on your slot)
join.step3: Manage cards from the player panel (“My panel”)
join.whoHint: Host and OBS use separate entry points. The player picks a slot in the block below.
join.ctaPlayerSub: Scroll to slot selection · then “My panel”
join.ctaObsSub: Open the global grid for Browser Source (all slots)
join.ctaObsSoonHint: Personal overlay — use “OBS overlay” on your slot after you pick it.
join.obs2: Paste the URL from “OBS overlay” on your slot or the global URL — depends on your scene.
join.obs3: Size: fill the source frame; enable transparent background in properties if available.
join.obs4: Refresh: optionally enable “Refresh browser when scene becomes active”.
join.slotsSub: Tap your number (as announced by the host). “My panel” is only your cards — do not use someone else’s slot.
join.noName: No name in the room yet
join.slotTakenToast: Цей слот зайнятий на іншому пристрої.
join.noPlayerDoc: Ще немає документа гравця для цього слоту (попроси ведучого додати кімнату).
join.noDevice: Не вдалося створити id пристрою — спробуй інший браузер або увімкни сховище.
join.promptNameOptional: Необов’язково — як тебе показувати за столом. Порожнє поле — без імені.
join.zoomHint: Player cameras (when enabled from their overlay) and the same cards as the global OBS view. View-only here — publish your cam from your personal /overlay.
join.zoomNoPlayers: No players in this room yet.

admin.title: Host panel
admin.needHostRole: Your account needs the host role. An administrator can assign it under Users.
admin.signInHint: Sign in with Twitch or Google — the panel opens automatically if your account is a host or admin.

hostChrome.reviveAllTitle: Скинути «вибув» у всіх гравців у кімнаті
hostChrome.sessionHistoryHint: Stored in this browser until room reset or “Clear” on the room page.
hostChrome.ballotQueueEmpty: Add people to the voting queue
hostChrome.voteSlotTimer: Time left: {sec}s (then stop & next slot — press Start)
hostChrome.voteSlotIdleHint: Next slot: after Start you get {sec}s for this step.

roster.hintPanel: Left — slots. Click to select; all actions are in the right panel.
roster.title: Players
roster.speaker: 🎤 Speaker
roster.nominateHint: Selected slot nominates. Pick who they nominate:
roster.pickSlot: Select a slot on the left
roster.bulkHint: Use the checkbox on a slot to select multiple players for bulk delete.
roster.manualBallotLastNomHint: Last target in the queue follows nominations; you set the rest with «Vote target».
roster.nonVoterHandsFirst: Final nomination slot: people who have not voted yet are listed first (for hands / order).

classic_crash.label: Classic: plane crash
classic_crash.hint: Wreckage, forest or field, scarce supplies, classic card set.

island_survival.label: Island
island_survival.hint: Water around, fish, sun, salt, dehydration.

limited_supplies.label: Low supplies
limited_supplies.hint: Almost nothing saved after the crash — scarcity focus.

toast.voteNotLinked: Rejoin from the lobby (account not linked to this slot)
toast.votingTiePickDefense: Tie — nominations cleared; pick slot time and run the revote queue.
toast.noNomineesForBallot: No nominated (living) players for a queue
toast.reviveAllNobody: Ніхто не був позначений як вибувший
toast.playerRevived: Slot {slot} is back in the game
toast.rosterSeeded: Кімната готова: додано відсутніх гравців p1–p10 з профілями
toast.revealProfessionFirst: У 1-му раунді спочатку відкрий професію, потім ще одну картку на вибір (характеристика або профіль)
toast.revealRoundLimit: У цьому раунді ліміт відкритих характеристик вичерпано (раунд {round})
toast.revealCannotCloseTrait: Відкриту тобою характеристику вже не можна сховати
toast.revealCannotCloseProfile: Відкритий профіль (вік/стать) вже не можна сховати

control.slotAccessTitle: This panel link is not for you
control.slotAccessHint: Open the lobby, pick your slot, and use “My panel” — or the same browser where you already claimed a slot.
control.deniedHostRole: You need a host or admin role. Ask an administrator or open the panel from an account that has access.
control.gameIdUnsafeHint: У ID є символи =, #, ? або & — такі посилання часто ламаються або плутають браузер. Краще test4 або test-4 (нова кімната = нові дані в Firebase).
control.gameIdUnsafeToast: Увага: символи = # ? & у ID гри псують посилання. Краще test4 або test-4.
control.genConfirmPlayer: Перегенерувати персонажа для слоту {slot}? Усі поля цього гравця будуть замінені новими випадковими значеннями.
control.genConfirmFirstPlayerBody: There are no players in the room yet — the first one (slot p1) will be created with new random stats.
control.genConfirmAll: Перегенерувати всіх гравців у цій кімнаті? Існуючі картки будуть замінені — дія для всього столу.
control.genConfirmAllEmpty: No one is in the room yet. Choose how many players to create with random cards (slots p1…pN).
control.genConfirmActiveOne: Випадкова нова активна карта для слоту {slot}? Поточна карта скинеться, запит гравця зніметься.
control.genConfirmActiveAll: Випадково змінити активні карти для всіх гравців? Поточні активні карти будуть перезаписані.
control.genConfirmGlobalField: Перекинути поле «{field}» для всіх гравців у кімнаті? Зміни одразу підуть у гру.
control.genConfirmChaos: «Хаос» перекидає випадкове поле (професія, здоров’я або фобія) для всіх гравців. Продовжити?
control.handLowerTitle: Hand is up — tap to lower
control.handRaiseTitle: Hand is down — tap to raise
control.deletePlayerConfirm: Остаточно видалити {slot} з кімнати? Документ персонажа зникне з Firestore.
control.bulkDeleteConfirm: Permanently remove slots {slots}? Character docs will be removed from Firestore.
control.deletePlayerDocMissing: У Firestore немає документа для слота {slot} (перевір ID кімнати в URL і в консолі)
control.nominationOnePerRound: Only one nomination per player per round (new replaces old)
control.tieBreakBody: Equal top votes: {a} and {b}. Queue reduced to these two.
control.tieBreakBodyN: Equal top “for” votes: {list}. Nominations cleared — only this revote queue remains.
control.tieBreakHint: Pick slot length, then press Start for the first of the two.
control.tieBreakHintN: Pick how long each nominee gets (discussion / defense), then press Start on the host panel in the same order.
control.elimSuggestBody: Most “for” votes went to slot {slot} (👍 total {votes}). Mark them eliminated?
control.elimSuggestHandsAgree: This slot also has the most hand raises in this session.
control.hostSessionHandsHint: Лічиться на цьому пристрої, поки відкрита панель ведучого: кожне нове підняття руки (з «опущено» до «піднято») дає +1 для слота.
control.hostSessionVotesEmpty: Поки порожньо — після голосування натисни «Стоп», щоб зберегти раунд у журнал.
control.hostSessionNoBallots: У цьому колі не зафіксовано жодного голосу.
control.playerPanelRevealHint: Open/Closed only controls the broadcast overlay. Here you always see your full sheet.
control.name: Name
control.cardRequestHost: The player wants to use a card on the show.

overlayPage.tokenMismatchHint: Відкрий лобі й оверлей зі свого слоту (у OBS — посилання без токена).
overlayPage.mosaicDragHandle: Drag to swap with another camera tile

voiceMedia.notConfiguredHint: In production set VITE_SIGNALING_URL to the same signaling host as Video call (.env / Vercel). Dev proxies to the API by default.
voiceMedia.waitingHint: Connecting after Firestore sync. If this stays long, check the game id and network.
voiceMedia.hintControls: Video/audio on player cards; mic & camera are here.
voiceMedia.spectatorHint: Spectator view: add ?player=p1 (your slot) to enable camera and mic.
voiceMedia.eliminatedNoPublish: Eliminated — camera and mic stay off.
voiceMedia.enableSoundHint: Browsers block remote audio until you interact. Click here or use Mic/Cam first.

adminPanel.sidebarHint: Live data from the API when the database is configured.
adminPanel.usersLead: Registered accounts and Wordle stats from the database.
adminPanel.usersForbidden: You are not allowed to load this list (admin session required).
adminPanel.usersNoDb: DATABASE_URL is not set on the server — user list is empty.
adminPanel.usersNoDbHint: Add DATABASE_URL to the server environment and restart the API; the list will load automatically.
adminPanel.usersNoMatches: No rows match the filter — try a different search.
adminPanel.streamersLead: Create a public slug for /wordle/:streamer and bind it to a user who has linked Twitch (IRC ingest uses their Twitch id).
adminPanel.streamersSaveError: Could not save — check slug format, duplicate name, or Twitch id already in use.
adminPanel.streamersNoTwitchOwners: No users with a linked Twitch id — link Twitch on an account first.
adminPanel.streamersDeleteConfirm: Delete this streamer row? Wordle stats tied to it may become unreachable.
adminPanel.streamersHint: Public lookup stays GET /api/streamer/:name — missing slug returns 404.
adminPanel.statsLead: Aggregates and leaderboards from saved Wordle stats.
adminPanel.ratingHelp: Rating = wins − losses (same as public leaderboard).
adminPanel.statsNoDb: DATABASE_URL is not set — stats are zero.
adminPanel.gamesLead: Stream controls are not wired to the server yet; buttons are placeholders.
adminPanel.sessionLead: What the browser thinks after GET /api/auth/me (httpOnly cookie). Use this to verify admin role and Twitch id in dev.

overlayCard.slotClosed: Slot closed until end of game
